title: Shock-ALE-SW: Shallow-water shock-wave simulations on moving triangular meshes
description: Shock-ALE-SW is a Python software package for two-dimensional shallow-water shock-wave simulations on moving triangular meshes. The package implements a Godunov-type finite-volume method with ALE mesh motion, exact local Riemann-state evaluation, and a rotated Riemann solver. The repository includes a reproducible notebook for a single planar shock-wave benchmark in a circular domain.
notes: This work was supported by the Russian Science Foundation (RSF), project No. 24-71-00113.
